address.title: Address
address.value: Business Park Sofia, Building 2, Sofia 1766, Bulgaria

items.answer1: Sign up for free at hr.bg. No credit card required. You can start posting jobs and managing candidates immediately. Our onboarding wizard will guide you through the setup process.
items.question2: Do you offer a free trial?
items.answer2: Yes — all paid plans include a 60-day free trial. No credit card required to start. You'll have full access to all features during the trial period.
items.answer3: Absolutely. We're SOC 2 Type II certified and fully GDPR compliant. Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard AES-256 encryption. We also conduct regular security audits.
items.question4: Can I migrate from my current ATS?
items.answer4: Yes. We offer a free migration service for customers on paid plans. Our team will help you import your existing candidate data, job postings, and company information. Contact our team to get started.
items.question5: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer5: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), bank transfers, and PayPal. For annual plans, we also offer invoice billing.
items.question6: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.answer6: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time with no penalties. Your data will remain accessible for 30 days after cancellation, giving you time to export if needed.
items.question7: Do you offer training and onboarding?
items.answer7: Yes! All paid plans include personalized onboarding sessions. We also offer comprehensive video tutorials, documentation, and live training webinars every week.
items.question8: What kind of support do you provide?
items.answer8: We offer email support for all plans, with response times under 24 hours. Premium and Enterprise plans include priority support, phone support, and a dedicated account manager.
